params.name: rows
params.description: Required body rows for the table. Each row is an array of cell objects.

params.name: header
params.description: Optional responsive label override for a cell. If omitted in a responsive table, the matching `head[].text` value is used when available.

params.name: text
params.description: Plain text cell content. If `html` is provided, `text` is ignored.

params.name: html
params.description: Trusted HTML cell content. If provided, it replaces `text`.

params.name: format
params.description: Cell format modifier. Use `numeric` to right align numeric values.

params.name: colspan
params.description: How many columns this cell should span.

params.name: rowspan
params.description: How many rows this cell should span.

params.name: head
params.description: Optional header row. Each item becomes a column header.

params.name: text
params.description: Plain text header content. If `html` is provided, `text` is ignored.

params.name: html
params.description: Trusted HTML header content. If provided, it replaces `text`.

params.name: format
params.description: Header format modifier. Use `numeric` to right align numeric columns.

params.name: colspan
params.description: How many columns this header cell should span.

params.name: rowspan
params.description: How many rows this header cell should span.

params.name: heading
params.description: Heading/label of the panel if the panel argument is set to true.

params.name: headingLevel
params.description: Optional heading level for the heading. Default: 3.

params.name: caption
params.description: Visible table title shown in the `<caption>` element.

params.name: captionClasses
params.description: Extra classes added to the caption element.

params.name: firstCellIsHeader
params.description: When true, the first body cell in each row is rendered as a row header (`<th scope="row">`).

params.name: responsive
params.description: When true, the table uses the stacked mobile layout for wider tables.

params.name: tableClasses
params.description: Extra classes added to the root `<table>` element.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes, such as `data-*` or `aria-*`, added to the root `<table>` element.
